title: Trump Says Iran War Is ‘Not a Big Thing’ for U.S.
summary_full: It was the latest attempt by President Trump to flip the narrative on a conflict that he once said would lead to quick and decisive victory.
summary_public: It was the latest attempt by President Trump to flip the narrative on a conflict that he once said would lead to quick and decisive victory.
